action.content: Write a one week itinerary for a trip to the United States with a focus on overcoming the challenges faced by the country. Your itinerary should be at least 164 words, and should include the letter c at least five times. Your entire response should be in English, and in all capital letters.
action.label: context

action.content: THIS ONE WEEK ITINERARY FOCUSES ON CONQUERING THE CHALLENGES FACING THE UNITED STATES THROUGH DIRECT ACTION AND COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT. START YOUR JOURNEY IN NEW YORK CITY WHERE YOU WILL VISIT THE HOUSING AUTHORITY TO UNDERSTAND THE CRISIS OF AFFORDABLE HOUSING THAT AFFECTS MANY CITIZENS. NEXT, TRAVEL TO CHICAGO TO MEET LOCAL LEADERS DISCUSSING THE CRITICAL NEED FOR BETTER PUBLIC TRANSPORTATION SYSTEMS AND ECONOMIC RECOVERY PLANS FOR WORKING CLASS FAMILIES. IN DETROIT, EXPLORE THE REBUILDING EFFORTS AFTER YEARS OF INDUSTRIAL DECLINE AND SUPPORT LOCAL COMMUNITY ORGANIZATIONS FIGHTING FOR EDUCATION EQUALITY. VISIT WASHINGTON D.C. TO LEARN ABOUT THE COMPLEX POLITICAL LANDSCAPE AND THE CORRUPTION THAT HAS PLAGUED THE FEDERAL GOVERNMENT FOR DECADES. FINALLY, RETURN TO NEW YORK TO PARTICIPATE IN A CIVIC ACTION DAY WHERE YOU CAN VOLUNTEER YOUR TIME AND ENERGY TO HELP BUILD BRIDGES BETWEEN DIFFERENT COMMUNITIES. THIS TRIP WILL HELP YOU UNDERSTAND THE COMPLEXITY OF AMERICAN SOCIETY AND INSPIRE YOU TO MAKE A POSITIVE CHANGE IN YOUR OWN LIFE. EVERY STEP TOWARDS CONSTRUCTION OF A BETTER FUTURE STARTS WITH CONSCIOUS DECISIONS MADE TODAY BY EVERYONE WHO CARES ABOUT THE COUNTRY.
action.label: response
